problem: Why does the immune system attack the body's own tissue in autoimmune disease?
hypothesis: If Telomerase activation/inhibition in target cells is applied to in, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 11 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
